_seed_note: Initial dates for evergreen entries are approximate; refine as new entries ship and rotate evergreens off as needed.

resources.label: Citation Check
resources.description: Free tool: paste a brief and verify every case citation against a real reporter database. Each cite is marked verified, suspect (resolves to a different case than named), or unconfirmed. Deterministic lookups, no AI in the loop, nothing stored. Pairs with the AI Sanctions Tracker.

resources.label: AI Sanctions Tracker
resources.description: Catalog of federal court orders sanctioning attorneys for filing AI-generated briefs containing fabricated case citations. Doctrine descends from Mata v. Avianca (S.D.N.Y. 2023) and Park v. Kim, 91 F.4th 610 (2d Cir. 2024). Eight cases verified and indexed.

resources.label: 49,000+ pages of free bankruptcy research
resources.description: Network crossed 49,000 active pages across 210+ publication domains. Combined indexing layer covers 7.9M federal bankruptcy cases, 11.5M PPP loan records, and 3.7M EIDL records, cross-searchable by debtor or borrower name.

resources.label: Search filters: chapter, year, district
resources.description: Cross-program search widget now supports filtering by Chapter (7/11/12/13), year, and district. Backwards-compatible with PPP and EIDL programs; defaults to no filter.

resources.label: RSS feed published
resources.description: Network research and news output now available via RSS at /feed.xml. Top 40 most-recent items, refreshed on each publishing pass.

resources.label: Per-row LegalCase JSON-LD on national case index
resources.description: Every case row on the 4,280-page national district index now emits Schema.org LegalCase + ItemList structured data, machine-citable by search engines and legal-research databases.

resources.label: Spanish corpus: 17 new statute-specific topic translations
resources.description: Subchapter V, dischargeability, vehicle cramdown, lien stripping, tax refunds, reaffirmation, discharge-injunction violations, hardship discharge, preference actions, mortgage cure, domicile rule, claim objections, plan modification, codebtor stay, retirement accounts, wage garnishment, Rule 9037.

resources.label: New top-of-funnel landing pages
resources.description: Three new search-intent landing pages: find-someone-in-bankruptcy, bankruptcy-records-lookup, free-pacer-alternative. Anchored to the cross-program name index.

resources.label: 26-BK-5 research brief
resources.description: Rule 9037 / Forms 121 and 309E1 SSN exposure: five amendments submitted to the Advisory Committee on Bankruptcy Rules.

resources.label: 501(c)(3) determination letter (IRS)
resources.description: Internal Revenue Service determination letter dated April 6, 2026 recognizes the Open Bankruptcy Project as tax-exempt under Section 501(c)(3). EIN 41-5159631. Public charity classification 170(b)(1)(A)(vi). Contributions tax-deductible under IRC § 170.

resources.label: 26-BK-3 research brief
resources.description: Automated Section 1328(f) discharge-bar screening: empirical methodology submitted to the Advisory Committee on Bankruptcy Rules.

resources.label: Section 329(b) caselaw map (8th + 10th Circuit)
resources.description: Federal caselaw mapping fee-disgorgement under 11 U.S.C. § 329(b).

resources.label: Section 329(b) motion template + scaffolding
resources.description: Pro se motion template with scaffolded fact sections and authorities for fee-disgorgement under § 329(b).

resources.label: Full Part 1 and Part 2 means test calculator
resources.description: Complete Chapter 7 means-test calculator covering presumption-of-abuse and disposable-income analysis.

resources.label: 61-term bankruptcy glossary
resources.description: Plain-English definitions for the 61 most common terms a pro se filer encounters.

resources.label: Guías en Español
resources.description: Spanish-language bankruptcy resources, state-by-state and statute-by-statute.

resources.label: Bankruptcy guides for all 50 states
resources.description: State-by-state filing guides, exemptions, district statistics, and local procedure.

resources.label: Latest bankruptcy data analysis
resources.description: OBP's news index: empirical analyses of filing trends, attorney patterns, and enforcement gaps.
